utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check if each is fully specified with details and costs:
- health_coverage: includes plan components and a total monthly cost; satisfies “physical and mental health insurance with costs” at least as costed items, though mental health not explicitly labeled, but costs provided. Acceptable as costs are specified.
- property_coverage: includes home/contents and specific photography equipment with monthly costs and a total; meets “home/contents insurance with costs.”
- travel_coverage: includes travel plan with cost and scope details; total cost provided; meets “travel insurance with costs.”
- additional_services: includes items and costs and total; meets “any enhancement services with costs.”
- total_budget: includes monthly and annual cost breakdown and extra details; meets “complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.” All items are present with costs and totals, so fully specified per the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I looked for each named item in the final coverage plan and matched it to the closest exact item name in the ground-truth ratings. Only items that have an exact counterpart in the ratings can be mapped. Items without an exact match (e.g., BerlinCare Basic, BudgetProtect Essentials, CareCo Basic professional liability, freelancer_package) cannot be rated because they do not appear in the ratings dataset. The following items do appear: VitalPlus Standard Travel Plan (as travel_insurance -> VitalPlus Standard Plan), Technology Protection (photography_equipment €40/month), and Telemedicine Services is implied under health but was not explicitly listed in the final plan, so it is not included. Home contents choice (BudgetProtect Essentials) does not match any rated product names. Therefore, only the matching items are mapped.
